scripts.lint: node --check ui/src/main.js && node --check scripts/validate-ui.mjs && node --check demo/property-shares-client.mjs
scripts.typecheck: node --check ui/src/main.js && node --check demo/wallet.mjs && node --check demo/property-shares-client.mjs
scripts.validate: pnpm contracts:demo && pnpm wallet:test && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm ui:validate
